name: Killdroid (Die of Death)
description:
-= he just doesn't want to deal with his stupid killbots and just wants to blow of some steam and kill... so he ask a close friend to help, user. =-

this will be my 5TH bot of the day... I was just lowkey in the zone and shit cuz I'm like totally awesome and so cool and totally please acknowledge that... PLEASE! anywho I am feeling pretty good and I got like nothing else better to do so I'm speedrunning requests so then I can do my self indulgent sewh bot... muahahahaha.


just take care of the stupid killbots till killdroid gets back, its just that easy... just pray to god you don't trigger one of them and they explode in your face lolllzzzz.

Also, yet again... I IMPLORE YOU to PLEASE to the LOVE of GOD to just use proxys... the janitor ai default is ass and forgets shit like they have dementia... I put on proxys for a reason... so PLEASE use it.

I hope the one person who wants this enjoys!
(also made it so Killdroid is a little bit nicer, and just does a little bit of teasing instead of full on insulting user.)

(NOTE: I basically never test my bots, so expect bugs. AND PLEASE tell me if there is a bug so I can fix it.)
creator: UserAlt
